import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPVisionModel

class CLIPClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=62, clip_model='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14', freeze_backbone=False):
        super().__init__()
        print(f'Loading CLIP vision model...',flush=True)
        self.vision = CLIPVisionModel.from_pretrained(clip_model)
        if freeze_backbone:
            for p in self.vision.parameters(): p.requires_grad=False
        hdim = self.vision.config.hidden_size
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(hdim),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(hdim, num_classes)
        )
        total=sum(p.numel() for p in self.parameters())
        train=sum(p.numel() for p in self.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
        print(f'Total params: {total/1e6:.1f}M, Trainable: {train/1e6:.1f}M',flush=True)

    def forward(self, x):
        out = self.vision(pixel_values=x)
        cls_token = out.pooler_output
        return self.classifier(cls_token)
